input.content: This summer, get ready for the most EPIC, mind-blowing animated event of the year!!! Critics agree: Luma is a guaranteed instant classic — laughter, tears, and wonder for the whole family! Don't miss the unforgettable journey everyone is talking about! #Luma #MustSee #InstantClassic

Story & heart.snippet: the most EPIC, mind-blowing animated event of the year
Story & heart.problem: There is no character, no want, no moment from the film. Any film could run this line, which means it sells nothing about this one.
Story & heart.fix: Lead with Luma and what she wants: a firefly afraid of the dark who has to become the light.

Claim validity.problem: No critics are named or quoted. Implied critical consensus without a real, attributed quote breaks the house claim rules.
Claim validity.fix: Cut it, or quote one real named critic with their outlet.

Claim validity.problem: 'Guaranteed' and 'instant classic' are both on the banned claims list. Nothing about reception can be guaranteed before release.
Claim validity.fix: Remove the claim entirely. Show the act-one image and let the audience decide.

Brand voice.problem: Trailer-voice opener. The brand sounds like a storyteller at a dinner table, never a movie-trailer announcer.
Brand voice.fix: Open on the character or the feeling: 'Luma is scared of the dark.'

Brand voice.problem: 'Unforgettable' and 'journey' are both on the banned lexicon; begging people not to miss it reads desperate.
Brand voice.fix: State when it opens and who it's for. Confidence, not pleading.

No-slop.problem: A three-part power list, and an em dash right before it. Both are hard-banned slop patterns.
No-slop.fix: Pick the one true feeling and name it plainly.

No-slop.problem: Hashtag stuffing, plus triple exclamation marks earlier. The lint rules allow at most one exclamation mark and no tag walls.
No-slop.fix: Drop the hashtags. One clean line about the release date does more.

rewrite: Luma is scared of the dark. Tonight she's the only light her swarm has. Bring the kid who still checks under the bed; this one's for them. In cinemas this summer.
